_meta.description: ORTHOM8pro 11-Node Pipeline — data extracted from monolith (ORTHOM8pro_index.html)

nodes.name: Data Ingest
nodes.tagline: Raw market data captured from scraper API
nodes.logic: Fetches one record per ticker per pipeline run at $0.0015/record. Tracks null fields automatically and assigns a completeness score (0–100%). Every pipeline run starts here — without it, nothing runs. At 12 trades/day on the $2K tier, this node fires ~252 times per trading day.
nodes.failure: Hard abort — no data means no signal. Rate limits handled with exponential backoff.
nodes.insight: This node is the entry point. Data quality at ingestion directly determines maximum signal accuracy achievable downstream.

nodes.name: Null Triage
nodes.tagline: Detects missing fields and routes to cheapest filler
nodes.logic: Scans the ingested record for null fields. Categorises each missing field by which provider can fill it most cheaply. Builds a priority-ordered enrichment queue — Finnhub free first, then FMP, then Alpha Vantage, then Claude AI as last resort. Avoids paying for data you already have.
nodes.failure: Non-blocking. If triage fails, enrichers are called in default order. Minor cost inefficiency only.
nodes.insight: Futures contracts legitimately have many null fields. Triage prevents wasted API calls on fields that are structurally unavailable.

nodes.name: Multi-Provider Enrichers
nodes.tagline: Parallel null-filling waterfall across paid data providers
nodes.logic: Three enrichment providers run in parallel after triage. Finnhub fills analyst ratings and insider transactions. FMP fills fundamentals, earnings estimates, and ratios. Alpha Vantage fills OHLCV bars and technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, EMA, ATR, ADX). Results are deep-merged into a unified enriched record.
nodes.failure: Partial tolerance. If one provider fails, others continue. Enriched record flagged with completeness_pct.
nodes.insight: This node contributes most to signal completeness. At $2K tier, paid plans unlock higher rate limits and more endpoints.

nodes.name: L2 Order Book Depth
nodes.tagline: Real-time bid/ask ladder and microstructure signals
nodes.logic: Captures the top 10 bid and ask levels every 500ms. Computes the order book imbalance ratio: (bid_vol − ask_vol) / (bid_vol + ask_vol). A positive imbalance suggests buy pressure. Imbalance is fed into confidence scoring with 20% weight on volume confirmation. Also detects thin books that could cause high slippage.
nodes.failure: Graceful degrade. If L2 unavailable, confidence node receives volume_confirmation = 0. Gate threshold harder to pass.
nodes.insight: Only available on Polygon paid tier. At MVP $200, this node is inactive — a major reason win rate is capped at 60% at that tier.

nodes.name: Options Greeks Node
nodes.tagline: Delta, Gamma, Theta, Vega — live volatility surface
nodes.logic: Fetches options Greeks for the at-the-money contract nearest expiry. IV rank and IV percentile are the primary signals — high IV rank (>70) flags earnings catalyst or event-driven setups. Delta estimates directional sensitivity. Feeds into sentiment and confidence nodes.
nodes.failure: Non-blocking. If ORATS unavailable, Greeks are nulled and confidence node runs without IV context. Confidence ceiling drops slightly.
nodes.insight: Active only from $2K institutional tier. Unlocking this node is one of the biggest qualitative jumps in signal quality.

nodes.name: Regime Detection AI
nodes.tagline: Classifies current market state every 15 minutes
nodes.logic: Claude Sonnet 4 analyses ADX value, VIX level, market breadth indicator, and 20-day rolling volatility to classify the market into one of 7 states: trending_bull, trending_bear, mean_reverting, high_volatility, low_volatility, crisis, or undefined. Each regime maps to a recommended strategy playbook (momentum, mean_reversion, hold, defensive).
nodes.failure: Falls back to last known regime classification. If stale by >30 min, strategy defaults to 'hold' until re-classified.
nodes.insight: Without regime detection, win rate degrades by ~3–5% across all tiers. This is the intelligence layer that prevents strategy mismatch.

nodes.name: AI Sentiment Scorer
nodes.tagline: News + analyst signals → bullish/bearish score with reasoning
nodes.logic: The most token-intensive node. Claude receives: latest news headlines (last 4h), analyst rating actions (upgrades/downgrades), insider transaction summary, and earnings surprise history. It outputs a sentiment score (−1 to +1), a label (bullish/bearish/neutral), a risk flag (low/medium/high/critical), and a black_swan_detected boolean.
nodes.failure: If Claude API unavailable, sentiment set to neutral (0.0) and confidence drops. Gate harder to pass — reducing trade frequency but protecting capital.
nodes.insight: Contributes 20% weight to the confidence gate. The black_swan_detected flag has fired on major earnings misses and macro announcements.

nodes.name: Correlation Guard
nodes.logic: Computes rolling 20-day pairwise Pearson correlations across all instruments in the watchlist. If the candidate trade instrument has |correlation| > 0.70 with any currently open position, the correlation_guard score is penalised. High correlation clustering feeds into confidence scoring with 10% weight.
providers: Internal — reads from PostgreSQL correlation_matrix table
nodes.failure: If correlation data stale (>8h), guard score defaults to 0.5 (neutral penalty). Threshold enforcement continues at reduced weight.
nodes.insight: Critical for multi-position portfolios. A fund running 5 correlated long positions is concentrated in one bet. This node prevents that silently.

nodes.name: Confidence Gate
nodes.tagline: 72% composite threshold — the trade filter that protects capital
nodes.logic: Weighted composite of 6 factors: technical_alignment (25%), volume_confirmation (20%), ai_sentiment (20%), risk_reward_ratio (15%), regime_filter (10%), correlation_guard (10%). If composite_score ≥ 0.72, the trade passes and an action (buy/sell) with direction (long/short) is emitted. Stop-loss and take-profit calculated using ATR-14 and the active regime playbook.
providers: Internal — aggregates all upstream node outputs
nodes.failure: If any upstream node fails, that factor defaults to its neutral/penalty value. The gate continues to operate — it never crashes.
nodes.insight: This is the most important node. At $2K institutional tier, all 6 factors are fully populated — why win rate climbs from 60% to 68%.

nodes.name: RL Execution Node
nodes.tagline: Reinforcement learning selects optimal order type and timing
nodes.logic: After the confidence gate passes, this node decides whether to execute as a market order, limit order, or stop-limit. It analyses real-time L2 book spread, current volatility (ATR), and time-of-day liquidity patterns to minimise slippage. All execution decisions are sent to IBKR TWS via the REST API.
nodes.failure: If IBKR connection fails, order queued for retry (up to 3 attempts). If IBKR TWS offline, circuit breaker triggered immediately.
nodes.insight: Reduces average slippage from 15bps (market order default) to 8bps at the $2K tier, directly improving net P&L.

nodes.name: Circuit Breaker
nodes.tagline: Autonomous kill switch — halts all trading on anomaly detection
nodes.logic: Monitors 9 trigger conditions in real time: daily_loss_limit (2% per instrument), portfolio_var_breach (5% VaR), ai_anomaly (black_swan_detected flag from sentiment node), fat_finger_detected (order size >5× normal), flash_crash (price movement >3% in <60s), api_data_glitch (completeness_pct <40%), correlation_breach, manual_override, drawdown_limit.
nodes.failure: The circuit breaker has no failure mode — it is designed to fail safe (halt all activity) rather than fail open.
nodes.insight: Has been triggered by stale data feeds, pre-market gap-up events, and earnings black swan moments. Always active, every cycle.

tiers.label: MVP
tiers.name: Seed Growth
tiers.desc: Free-tier APIs only. L1 quotes, basic AI sentiment. Pure proof-of-concept before committing live capital. Ideal for paper trading validation.

tiers.label: Early Live
tiers.name: Active Alpha
tiers.desc: Real-time news stream and paid technical indicators. Still L1 constrained but live capital is possible with careful position sizing.

tiers.label: Semi-Pro
tiers.name: Powerhouse
tiers.desc: True L2 order book active. Correlation matrix wired and refreshing. Regime detection classifying market state every 15 minutes.

tiers.label: Institutional
tiers.name: Strategic
tiers.desc: Options Greeks live via ORATS. RL-based execution node selects Limit vs Market. Complete 11-node pipeline. Investor-presentable at this tier.

tiers.label: Professional
tiers.name: Sovereign
tiers.desc: Bloomberg-equivalent data stack. Multi-asset coverage across equity, futures, and FX. Dedicated VPS with co-location latency advantage.

tiers.label: Full Instit.
tiers.name: Institutional
tiers.desc: Nanosecond tick data, L3 order flow, HFT-lite execution routing, full hot-standby redundancy. The ceiling for this architecture.
